satisfies_us_sb_006_note: Work-scaling sanity check only. Validates linear memory-work scaling, NOT removal of a seeded Gap-1/2/3/4 cause. The real US-SB-006 counterfactual is in counterfactual_gap_results.json.
description: Memory-bound work-scaling counterfactual: profile vector_add with N=16M (baseline) and N=32M (2x work). Model predicts linear scaling (2x time). Both kernels verified correct.
methodology: Two kernel variants (N=16M baseline, N=32M 2x work) profiled on 910B3 NPU:1 with msprof. Both produce correct element-wise add output. Model predicts memory-bound linear scaling: T(2x) = 2*T(1x).
